infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Tasti needs your location to show nearby vendors and let you post your location.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Tasti needs your location to notify customers when you go live nearby.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Tasti needs camera access to take photos for your vendor profile.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Tasti needs photo library access to upload photos for your vendor profile.

plugins.photosPermission: Tasti needs access to your photos to upload vendor images.
plugins.cameraPermission: Tasti needs camera access to take vendor photos.
